project.name: trustanchor
project.currentFocus: The approved UI redesign is being implemented as a banknote intaglio plate proof and serial-number register direction; next action is final validation and local dev-server review.
durableFacts: Docker development image installs Node dependencies with npm ci during build, not at container startup.
The web service host port is configurable through WEB_PORT with default 3000.
Bootstrap admin authentication is environment-backed through BOOTSTRAP_ADMIN_USERNAME and BOOTSTRAP_ADMIN_PASSWORD.
BOOTSTRAP_ADMIN_PASSWORD may be plaintext in development/test and must be SHA-256 hex in production.

The active UI concept is a banknote intaglio plate proof and serial-number register with engraved monochrome palette, one warm security accent, serial-compare flip motion, engraved type contrast, and compact micro-ledger rails.
Admin routes are protected by Next.js middleware using JWT session tokens stored in cookies.
Document proof signing uses RSA-PSS SHA-256 (PS256) to align with the cryptography assignment rubric.
Document proof payloads now include an Autokey Cipher transform before AES-256-GCM encryption; SHA-256, RSA-PSS, and AES-GCM remain the security controls.
Public verification pages render scannable QR codes from qrcode-generator.
Print-ready certificate pages are available at /verify/{verificationCode}/print.
Tampered or legacy proof material returns proofVerified false with status proof_invalid instead of a 500.
Bootstrap admin password accepts plaintext in development/test and requires SHA-256 hex in production.
Server-side certificate PDF rendering is available at /api/verifications/{verificationCode}/certificate-pdf and stores artifacts in MinIO.
MinIO is used as a self-hosted open-source object storage target in Docker development.
Issued At is server-controlled audit metadata and is not editable from the admin issuance form.
Current authenticated access has two internal login roles: platform_admin from bootstrap credentials and institution_admin from institution-owned DB credentials.
Public verification is unauthenticated and is not a login role.
Admin dashboard summaries, template lists, issuance lists, and audit logs are scoped by session institutionId.
The Institutions admin page is available to platform_admin sessions at /admin/institutions.
Creating an institution also creates its initial institution_admin operator account.
Platform admins can list institution operators, add operators, and reset operator passwords.
Active sessions on /login redirect by role: platform_admin to /admin/institutions, institution_admin to /admin.
The public homepage remains accessible while signed in and shows a role-aware internal access panel.
Phase 10 includes production Docker Compose, standalone Docker image, migration baseline, production environment template, deployment guide, and black-box test plan.

lastAchievements: Added a reversible Autokey Cipher layer to document proof payloads before AES-256-GCM encryption.
Kept verification backward-compatible with legacy non-Autokey encrypted payloads.
Added unit coverage for Autokey Cipher round-trip behavior and preserved proof tamper rejection tests.
Updated cryptography docs, ADR, API contract, flow overview, database notes, and project brief for Autokey Cipher.
Refreshed public and admin UI styling into a brighter sunlit forensic registry direction.
Preserved the printable certificate layout by locally pinning legacy certificate artifact color tokens.
Replaced the UI design contract with the approved banknote intaglio plate proof and serial-number register direction.
Added docs/doc-index.md as the compact documentation routing map required when docs/ exists.
Locked the hero composition as a serial register plate and implemented public, login, verification result, and admin surfaces toward the intaglio micro-ledger direction.
Hardened responsive behavior for the serial register hero, micro-ledger strip, proof status block, and admin ledger tables.
Fixed clipped homepage hero text by making the lookup-panel headline container-aware.
Removed the blank stacked-layout gap by letting the serial register plate stage size to content below 1180px.
Corrected UI token drift by reducing paper chroma, neutralizing shadows and linework, and removing blocked typography fallbacks from CSS.
pendingIssues: Next.js 14.2.5 and npm audit reported security advisories during Docker build.
npm install reported 14 audit vulnerabilities after adding qrcode-generator, pdf-lib, minio, and redis.
Playwright is not installed locally, so no browser screenshot regression was run.
.next cache is owned by nobody/nogroup, so lint must use --no-cache unless cache permissions are fixed.
nextBestActions: Review the intaglio proof register redesign in the browser across desktop and mobile.
Run docs/blackbox-testing.md against the production compose stack and capture screenshots for the final presentation.
Prepare presentation notes showing Autokey Cipher as an academic layer and AES/RSA/SHA-256 as security controls.
Upgrade Next.js to a patched compatible version in a separate dependency update.
validationState: npm run validate passed on 2026-05-11 after Autokey Cipher and bright UI refresh.
Document proof unit tests cover RSA-SHA256 happy path, Autokey Cipher round trip, tampered hash rejection, and tampered encrypted payload rejection.
API smoke test passed for health, OpenAPI, login, certificate template creation, certificate issuance, and public verification.
QR unit tests cover QR matrix and SVG generation.
Docker smoke passed for public verification, print, QR, PDF, template creation, issuance, revocation, encrypted recipient_identifier persistence, and role-scoped admin flows.
Docker production image build passed with standalone Next.js output.
Docker Compose production config validates with .env.production.example.
Homepage smoke passed: signed-in users can still load / with 200 while /login redirects by role.
npm run validate passed on 2026-05-17 after the intaglio proof register design contract update.
npm run validate passed on 2026-05-17 after implementing the intaglio proof register UI surfaces.
npm run validate passed on 2026-05-17 after responsive hardening.
npm run validate passed on 2026-05-17 after fixing clipped homepage hero text.
npm run validate passed on 2026-05-17 after the stacked plate gap fix.
npm run validate passed on 2026-05-17 after palette and typography anti-repeat corrections.
